title: SEO Opportunity Miner
summary: Turn noisy keyword and content inputs into prioritized SEO content opportunities and follow-up actions.

sample_features.query: Summarize the highest priority risk and recommended next step.

knowledge_base: SEO Opportunity Miner is positioned as a Growth AI starter that emphasizes fast iteration, clear documentation, and production-friendly interfaces.
The primary value proposition is: Turn noisy keyword and content inputs into prioritized SEO content opportunities and follow-up actions.
Recommended operating model: ship a small API, add observability, validate outputs with stakeholder review, and monitor the top business KPI every week.
Typical stakeholders include analytics, operations, product, and leadership teams working on seo, content, ai.
